## What

Brief description of the change.

## Why

Why is this change needed? Link to any related issues (e.g., `Fixes #123`).

## How

How was this implemented? Highlight any important design decisions.

## Checklist

- [ ] Code compiles without errors (`make build`)
- [ ] All tests pass (`make test`)
- [ ] Linter passes (`make lint`)
- [ ] New functionality includes tests
- [ ] Documentation updated (README, command help text) if applicable
- [ ] SPDX license header present on new files
